doc.title: Available-for-sale debt — mark to market through OCI
doc.event: Lark Co. holds AVAILABLE-FOR-SALE debt securities with an amortized cost of $100,000 at year-end. Prepare the year-end fair value adjustment.

variants.label: FV 106,000 — gain to OCI, income untouched

entries.caption: Year-end: AFS portfolio to fair value (cost 100,000 → 106,000)

lines.label: FV − amortized cost
lines.why: Same valuation-account mechanics as trading — the balance targets (FV − cost).
lines.trap: The mechanics are identical to trading ON PURPOSE; the exam is testing whether you know where the OTHER side goes.

lines.account: Unrealized Holding Gain or Loss — Equity
lines.label: to OCI, not income
lines.why: AFS holdings aren't performance yet — the gain accumulates in AOCI (equity) until the security is sold.
lines.trap: —Equity vs —Income is a one-word difference that moves the number between net income and OCI. Graders live here.

lines.account: Unrealized Holding Gain or Loss — Equity
lines.label: OCI absorbs the drop
lines.why: Net income never hears about it (unless it's a credit loss — that's impairment, a different rule).
lines.trap: A market-rate-driven drop parks in OCI; a CREDIT-driven drop is impairment and hits income. Read WHY the value fell.

lines.label: to the (FV − cost) target
lines.trap: Amortized-cost interest revenue keeps accruing underneath in both directions.

memorize.body: Debt classification map: HTM → amortized cost, no remeasurement. Trading → FV, changes to INCOME. AFS → FV, changes to OCI (recycled to income when sold). One table worth memorizing cold.
On SALE of AFS, the accumulated OCI for that security RECYCLES into net income as part of the realized gain/loss — the deferral ends, it never disappears.

questions.prompt: AFS debt (cost 100,000) has year-end FV 106,000. Net income includes…

distractors.feedback: 6,000-to-income is the TRADING treatment. AFS unrealized gains go to OCI (Unrealized Holding G/L — Equity); net income shows nothing until sale.

accountBank.account: Unrealized Holding Gain or Loss — Equity
Unrealized Holding Gain or Loss — Income

build.scaffold: Same two-line machine as trading — the whole test is picking '—Equity' over '—Income.' Say the classification out loud before touching the credit line.
